display_name: Omega Complete Demonstration / Diagnostics Reference (Known Simulation)
description: A controlled 30-year synthetic dataset with every native Omega input plus example outputs for charts, diagnostics, optimization, retrospective analysis, coverage and MSE. It is software-test evidence, not a real stock assessment.
expected_behavior: All native Omega data-driven workspaces have compatible inputs. Diagnostic outcomes may include warnings by design. NOAA/SS3 structural validation remains linked to the separate packaged official NOAA Simple dataset because SS3 control and starter files cannot be truthfully represented by a generic CSV.
